moderators.language_notes: Portal available in Korean and English with language switcher

evidence.API_evidence: Lineage 2M API documented with GET endpoints for market items search, item price statistics, item info, and server info. API server at https://dev-api.plaync.com/l2m/v1.0
evidence.SDK_evidence: No SDK documentation found. GitHub repositories contain code but no official SDK packages or client libraries documented
evidence.language_evidence: Language switcher shows English/Korean options. Terms and privacy policy available in multiple languages including English, Korean, Russian, Japanese, Chinese, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese

coding_notes: ROLE=1 because API requires authentication key and registration. DATA=1 because comprehensive Terms of Use and Privacy Policy specify data usage restrictions for developers. OPEN=1 because registration appears to be free self-service (login to PLAYNC and register app to get API key). GIT_prog_lang includes Jupyter Notebook which is not in valid list, so counted as 4 valid languages: Python, C++, JavaScript, HTML.

changes.GIT_prog_lang_list: "Python; C++; JavaScript; HTML; Jupyter Notebook" → "C++; HTML/CSS; JavaScript; Python"
